data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for recipient contact and channel.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Recipient contact + channel (email/SMS/link)', but the provided evidence does not include any checks or reads that confirm the existence or correctness of this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and customer interactions, none specifically address the recipient contact and channel aspect, leading to an inconclusive result regarding this requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the 'Recipient contact + channel (email/SMS/link)' is present or valid.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
